title: MXene-based bioabsorbable bandage speeds up diabetic wound repair
content:
Nature Reviews Materials, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41578-026-00941-3

An article in Science Advances reports a fully bioabsorbable, glucose-powered electronic bandage that uses MXene-based electrodes to harvest biochemical energy and restore wound edge fields in diabetic tissues.

title: A mechanistic investigation of the relationship between battery energy and capacity
content: Battery state of health is conventionally tracked by capacity (Ah), yet energy (Wh) is the critical metric for real-world applications. These two metrics often diverge, leading to inaccurate lifetime predictions and possible safety concerns. This work establishes and validates a theoretical framework linking this divergence to specific degradation modes with an impact of the electrode chemistry, the operating regime, the kinetics, and the depth of discharge.

title: Cost-effective valorization of 2,3-butanediol to high-value chemicals and jet fuel
content: This work presents an optimized process for biomass-derived sustainable aviation fuel production through 2,3-butanediol. 2,3-Butanediol utilization is limited by separation from water, but this challenge is solved by reactive extraction to form dioxolanes with an aldehyde. Isobutyraldehyde formed in situ eliminates the need for an external aldehyde source, enabling the economic and environmental viability of the process. Techno-economic analyses and life cycle assessments indicate fuel and chemical production scenarios with <$2.50 per gallon gas equivalent and >58% reduction in CO2 emissions.

title: The interplay between stack pressure, mechanical expansion and degradation pathways in lithium-ion batteries
content:
Nature Energy, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-02087-6

While electrochemical degradation in lithium-ion batteries is well studied, the role of stack pressure in long-term cycling remains unclear. Here the researchers use a high-precision pressure-controlled dilatometry tool to optimize stack pressure and understand how it prolongs battery lifetime.
